end local function o(o)return V[o+(-442133-(-471561))]end do local o=string.sub local k=table.concat local d=string.char local f=table.insert local r=V local D=string.len local p=type local return(function(V,d,f,r,D,p,O,N,j,C,k,t,x,P,F,y,Z,K,s,g,E,a,S)k,E,y,j,P,s,a,K,C,N,g,Z,S,F,t,x=function(k,f,r,D)local u,c,s,X,C,W,O,M,l,z,S,U,kk,H,n,G,J,T,t,Q,b,A,q,dk,Y,h,m,g,B,ok,Vk,L,fk,R,w,e,i,I,v
